items.title: USDA updates privacy notice for National SNAP Information Database
items.summary: USDA published a modified Privacy Act System of Records Notice (USDA/FNA-15) for the National SNAP Information Database on June 15, 2026. The revised notice says SNAP records may be disclosed only where the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 permits, and it narrows routine uses (including law enforcement and fraud/waste/abuse) to better track the statute’s confidentiality provisions.

items.title: WIC FY2026 fruit & vegetable benefit amounts: $26 kids, $48 pregnant/postpartum, $52 breastfeeding
items.summary: USDA’s WIC Policy Memorandum #2026-2 sets FY 2026 monthly cash-value voucher/benefit (CVV/B) amounts at $26 for children, $48 for pregnant and postpartum participants, and $52 for fully/mostly breastfeeding participants. USDA notes the FY 2026 inflation adjustment is 11.8% over the FY 2022 baseline, resulting in a $1 increase for pregnant/postpartum participants and no change for children and breastfeeding participants versus FY 2025.

items.title: CMS proposed rule would tighten Medicaid state directed payments; KFF highlights $510B federal spending estimate
items.summary: KFF reports that CMS released a proposed rule in May 2026 to implement new limits on Medicaid state directed payments (SDPs), with CMS estimating the changes would reduce federal Medicaid spending by $510 billion over 2026–2034 (and elsewhere in the rule analysis over 2026–2035). The proposed rule would phase down grandfathered SDPs by reducing the total approved payment amount by 10% each year starting with the first rating period after January 1, 2028.

items.title: SSA June 2026 payment dates: SSI June 1; Social Security/SSDI on June 3, 10, 17, and 24
items.summary: The Social Security Administration’s official 2026 payment schedule shows SSI payments scheduled for June 1, 2026. Social Security and SSDI payments are scheduled for June 3 (for people who received Social Security before May 1997 or who get both SSI and Social Security) and then on June 10, June 17, and June 24 based on birth date ranges.

items.title: FAFSA now provides real-time FAFSA Submission Summary after you submit
items.summary: Federal Student Aid announced the launch of real-time FAFSA results effective June 1, 2026. Students can see their FAFSA Submission Summary information immediately after submitting the FAFSA, instead of waiting for later processing.

items.title: FAFSA deadline reminder: 2025–26 federal FAFSA closes June 30, 2026
items.summary: The federal FAFSA submission deadline for the 2025–26 award year is June 30, 2026 (with the form closing after that). Students who still need aid eligibility for 2025–26 should submit before the deadline, since late submissions generally can’t receive federal aid for that award year.

items.title: FAFSA deadline: 2026–27 federal FAFSA due June 30, 2027
items.summary: For the 2026–27 award year (covering July 1, 2026 through June 30, 2027), the federal FAFSA deadline is June 30, 2027. If you submit, you can generally make corrections after submission (within the correction window published by Federal Student Aid).

items.title: USDA updates WIC EBT handbook section to streamline Advance Planning Document process
items.summary: USDA says it updated the WIC EBT section of FNS Handbook 901 to streamline the EBT Advance Planning Document (APD) process. Highlights include allowing an updated Planning APD to start with a letter plus budget/budget narrative/schedule, making alternatives analysis and cost-benefit analysis optional, and consolidating some implementation APD requirements.
